subagent-context-assemble.description: On cue, pre-assemble execution context for delegated subagent tasks.

params.instruction: Assemble compact subagent context: goals, constraints, recent evidence, expected output format.

copilot-issue-template.description: On cue, produce a structured issue body template for Copilot SWE agent work.

params.instruction: Generate issue sections: problem statement, acceptance criteria, constraints, validation plan.

copilot-feedback-capture.description: On cue, capture outcomes from Copilot PRs to improve future delegation quality.

params.instruction: Extract what worked, what failed, and reusable lessons from Copilot review/CI outcomes.
